Advertising_Expenditure_x.description: Advertising expenditure in $100s, the independent variable in the simple linear regression model. Required for computing SSE which the answer references as previously calculated.

Sales_Revenue_y.description: Sales revenue in $1,000s, the dependent variable in the simple linear regression model. Required for computing SSE which the answer references as previously calculated.

n.description: Sample size (number of data points), explicitly used in the answer to compute degrees of freedom (n−2=3) for estimating σ².
